caption: A person is seen from a top-down perspective working on a craft project on a white gridded cutting mat. They are wearing a white smartwatch on their left wrist and rings on their fingers. In the scene, there are various pieces of patterned green and yellow paper cut into shapes, including Christmas trees, a rectangular card base with a brown stripe, and smaller rectangles. Tools like a stamping kit and a black tool are also present. The person uses their hands to manipulate a white piece of fabric or foam and a light-colored rectangular piece of paper. Across the sequence, they move the white material toward the paper, eventually positioning the paper over the workspace. A watermark that reads "Stamping" is visible in the bottom left corner of the scene.
